note: Runtime abstraction for distributed training/inference and device placement.

name: NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM
note: NVIDIA optimized LLM inference stack for GPU deployment.

github.description: TensorRT LLM provides users with an easy-to-use Python API to define Large Language Models (LLMs) and supports state-of-the-art optimizations to perform inference efficiently on NVIDIA GPUs. TensorRT LLM also contains components to create Python and C++ runtimes that orchestrate the inference execution in a performant way.
